expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Manage workspace membership and audit history.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add workspace membership and audit-log schema",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership and audit records stored so that invites, role changes, and removals can be tracked safely.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace membership records support invite state, role, and active or revoked status",
        "Audit-log entries can record membership changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Invite members by email",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that I can add people without editing the database.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Inviting a member by email creates a pending membership record",
        "Invalid email addresses are rejected",
        "An audit entry is recorded for the invite",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Change member role",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role so that access matches responsibility.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Member roles can be changed between viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Role changes are persisted for the selected member",
        "An audit entry is recorded for the role change",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke access so that removed members can no longer enter the workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoking access disables the selected member membership",
        "Revoked members no longer count as active workspace members",
        "An audit entry is recorded for the revocation",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "View recent membership changes in workspace settings",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can audit access management.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The workspace settings page shows recent membership changes from the audit log",
        "Entries include the actor, action, target member, and timestamp",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
